prd_refs: §6.4 — default tool list and inventory rules.
description: Detect external CLI tools using `Get-Command`. Cache results for `tools.inventoryCacheMinutes` (default 10). Distinguish required tools (those a registered tool depends on) from optional ones. Missing required tools produce `needs_dependency` plans rather than improvised commands (per §6.4).
notes: Mock `Get-Command` deterministically; do not rely on the host PATH in tests.
steps: TDD: Inventory finds tools that exist in PATH (via mocked `Get-Command`).
TDD: Inventory marks missing tools as `present = $false`.
TDD: Inventory caches for the configured TTL.
TDD: Cache invalidates when configuration mtime changes (per §10.3 caching rules).
TDD: Required vs optional flag respected in output.
TDD: Resolved source path included where `Get-Command` provides it.
Author `Private/Context/Get-ToolInventory.ps1` taking the preferred-tool list from effective config.
Cache file: in-memory plus `~/.slashops/cache.json` per config. Key by tool name + platform.
Public `Get-SlashOpsToolInventory` exposes the inventory for diagnostics.
name: [ctx-03] Tool inventory with caching
